title: Department Manager Vacancy at V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Department Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners:
V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail South Asia Partners!
